meta.title: Reynoso Construction — Home Improvements in Staten Island & NYC
meta.description: Licensed home improvement contractor serving Staten Island and all five NYC boroughs. Plumbing, electrical, painting, roof and floor repair, kitchen and bath remodeling, decks, and more. Free estimates by phone or WhatsApp.
meta.ogAlt: Reynoso Construction — Home Improvements in Staten Island & NYC

hero.badge: Licensed NY LLC · Family owned · Free estimates
hero.title: Quality home improvements across Staten Island and NYC
hero.subtitle: From a leaky faucet to a full kitchen remodel — Francisco and the Reynoso Construction crew handle it all, on schedule and on budget.
hero.whatsappPrefill: Hi Francisco, I'd like a free estimate for some work at my home.
hero.imageAlt: Recently completed bathroom remodel in Staten Island — modern beige tile, floating wood vanity with marble integrated sink, glass shower doors, and recessed lighting.
hero.seeMore: See the full before and after

services.sectionSubtitle: Residential repairs, renovations, and installations across every room of your home.
services.ctaPrefill: Hi Francisco, I have a question about a job you might be able to help with.

plumbing.name: Plumbing
plumbing.description: Leak repair, fixture replacement, drain clearing, and supply-line work.

electrical.name: Electrical
electrical.description: Outlets, switches, lighting, and minor service upgrades — done to code.

painting.name: Painting
painting.description: Interior and exterior — clean lines, full prep, and proper-finish coats.

roofRepair.name: Roof Repair
roofRepair.description: Leak patching, flashing, shingle replacement, and storm-damage fixes.

floorRepair.name: Floor Repair
floorRepair.description: Squeaks, sagging boards, water damage, and subfloor reinforcement.

flooringInstall.name: Flooring Installation
flooringInstall.description: Hardwood, laminate, vinyl, and tile — measured and installed start to finish.

kitchenBath.name: Kitchen & Bath Remodeling
kitchenBath.description: Cabinets, countertops, tile, fixtures, and full layout redesigns.

carpetInstall.name: Carpet Installation
carpetInstall.description: Wall-to-wall carpet over padding, including stairs and transitions.

wallpaperInstall.name: Wallpaper Installation
wallpaperInstall.description: Clean prep, plumb seams, and bubble-free finish on any pattern.

doorInstall.name: Door Installation
doorInstall.description: Interior, exterior, and storm doors — frames, hardware, and weather sealing.

deckInstall.name: Decks — Build & Repair
deckInstall.description: New deck builds, board replacement, railing repair, and refinishing.

hotWaterTank.name: Hot Water Tank Installation
hotWaterTank.description: Replace or upgrade your water heater with proper venting and shut-offs.

portfolio.sectionSubtitle: Complete bathroom remodel in Staten Island — demolition, tile, plumbing, lighting, glass, and finish carpentry, all by Francisco's crew.
portfolio.dragHint: Drag the slider to reveal the transformation.

project1.caption: Bathroom remodel · Staten Island · doorway view
project1.beforeAlt: Worn bathroom interior with dated brown tile, dropped ceiling, and old sink
project1.afterAlt: Renovated bathroom interior with modern beige tile, recessed lighting, and glass shower doors

project2.caption: Same bathroom · interior view
project2.beforeAlt: Original bathroom interior with dated tile, dim lighting, and old fixtures
project2.afterAlt: Renovated bathroom with marble integrated sink, floating wood vanity, and modern shower

portfolio.footnote: Have a project of your own in mind? Send Francisco a few photos on WhatsApp for a free estimate.

licensed.title: NY-licensed LLC
licensed.description: Home Improvements By Reynoso Construction LLC — registered with New York State.

local.title: Local to Staten Island
local.description: Based on Oldfield St — your neighbor, not a corporate contractor across the country.

free.title: Free estimates
free.description: No hidden fees and no obligation. We come look, then we quote in writing.

bilingual.title: English & Spanish
bilingual.description: Atención completa en inglés y en español. Llámanos o escríbenos por WhatsApp.

area.sectionSubtitle: Based in Staten Island, available across all five boroughs.
area.footnote: Outside this area? Send us a message — we still might be able to help.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Fill out the form and tap Send. Your message opens directly in WhatsApp so Francisco can reply right away.

form.name: Your name
form.detailsPlaceholder: Tell us a little about what needs to be done.
form.greeting: Hi Francisco — I'd like a free estimate.

whatsappFloat.label: Chat on WhatsApp
whatsappFloat.prefill: Hi Francisco, I saw your website and would like a free estimate.
